metadata.description: Marketplace hosting two variants of the prd-pr dev-workflow plugin: prd-pr (Claude Code) and prd-pr-copilot (Copilot CLI). Both run the orchestrator-driven plan-then-build flow with vertical-slice architecture and slice-by-slice implementation, dispatching helper subagents as needed.

plugins.name: prd-pr
plugins.description: Claude Code dev-workflow plugin — orchestrator skill (workshop-dev-workflow) drives the full plan-then-build flow in the main session, dispatching helper subagents (code-explorer, code-architect, plan-reviewer, impl-backend, impl-frontend, impl-simplify) as needed.

plugins.name: prd-pr-copilot
plugins.description: Copilot CLI variant — orchestrator skill drives the 9-phase plan-then-build flow with vertical-slice architecture and slice-by-slice implementation. Agents use Copilot's .agent.md format.
